# Zscaler Resilience | Zscaler

**Source:** https://www.zscaler.com/products-and-solutions/zscaler-resilience
**Captured:** 2026-04-25 via WebFetch.

---

## Value Proposition

"Uninterrupted business continuity for customers, in all scenarios, with the industry's most resilient security cloud"

Zscaler Resilience delivers a comprehensive capability set ensuring continuous operations during blackouts, brownouts, and catastrophic failure events.

## Core Capabilities

### Infrastructure Resilience

- **Physical/Virtual Hardware**: Robust infrastructure with redundancy and sufficient processing capacity
- **Cloud Architecture**: Purpose-built software architecture enabling differentiation and rapid innovation
- **Interconnect**: Carrier-neutral data centers, internet exchange peering, and bandwidth sufficiency with BGP rerouting for traffic flexibility
- **Security & Compliance**: Zero-trust least-privilege principles minimize attack surface and lateral movement

### Failure Scenario Handling

- **Minor Failures**: Automatic remediation for node failures or software bugs with minimal user impact
- **Blackouts**: Autonomous or manual failover mechanisms address localized outages and connectivity issues
- **Brownouts**: Dynamic service edge selection and customer-controlled data center exclusion mitigate degradation
- **Catastrophic Events**: Dedicated business continuity solutions maintain internet, SaaS, and private application access; routes to private service edges with critical-app-only restrictions during full cloud outages

## Operational Excellence

Zscaler's decade-plus operational maturity across the world's largest inline security cloud complements resilient infrastructure through proven processes covering software development to incident management.

## Key Benefits

- Continuous security policy enforcement with zero-trust access during disaster scenarios
- Seamless user experiences across all failure conditions
- Eliminated legacy backup infrastructure and on-premises VPN costs

## Related Products

Zscaler **Business Continuity Cloud** (separate product, https://www.zscaler.com/products-and-solutions/business-continuity-cloud) is the deployment surface for the catastrophic-event tier — adds private service edges + private control plane for full-cloud-outage scenarios.
